versions.title: Background Scenes and What's New Modal
versions.summary: Duskry now has a richer scenic background system with more customization.

items.text: Added more scenic day, dusk, and night backgrounds.
You can now change both the start time and assigned background for each auto scene slot.
Background selection is smoother with direct hover actions in Appearance.
Added a 'What's New' modal to highlight new features after updates.

versions.title: Background Scenes
versions.summary: Duskry now has a richer scenic background system with more customization and better preview controls.
